chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1611 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 3. For hearing of MA 13857/16 24.10.2016. Mr. Sanaullah Khoso, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G alongwith ASI Manzoor Hussain P.S Kazi Ahmed. -.-.-. Today, learned A.A.G has filed statements of respondents No.1 & 2 wherein, inter alia, it has been stated that around 9 FIRs have been lodged at various occasions against the petitioner and the instant proceedings is not maintainable. Primarily questions of proprietary rights are involved in present case, which can only be decided through a proper trial. In the last order it is mentioned that petitioner No.1 is already agitating his right in F.C.Suit No. 99/2014. In these circumstances, on last date of hearing petitioner’s another Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-502 of 2015 was also tagged with the instant Constitutional Petition. However, scope and nature of both these matters is entirely different. Instant petition is disposed of with the directions that police officials shall not cause harassment to the petitioners and will conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law without siding with any of the private respondents. As far as the tagged Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-502/2015 is concerned, the same shall proceed on its own merits and will be decided accordingly. With these observations, instant petition is disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
